name: Origin by Chris Shiflett
intro: 一个完成度很高的个人网站示例，展示创业者、产品设计师和开发者的个人介绍与内容组织。
intro_en: A polished personal site that shows how an entrepreneur, product designer, and developer presents identity, work, and writing.

name: Paperclip
intro: 视觉完成度很高的 AI 产品官网，可参考动效、排版和产品叙事方式。
intro_en: A strong AI product site with clear motion, layout, and product story ideas.

name: Impeccable
intro: 一个围绕 frontend-design skill 打造的专题站点，适合参考工具型产品页面的文案组织和视觉包装。
intro_en: A focused site around frontend-design skills, useful for studying how a skill product frames features, commands, and anti-patterns.

name: Design Prompts
intro: 一个 AI 驱动的设计风格探索器，用同一份内容展示多种视觉风格，适合参考 prompt 到界面结果的映射。
intro_en: An AI-powered design style explorer that renders the same content in many aesthetics, useful for studying prompt-to-interface mapping.

name: Aura
intro: 一个 AI 落地页生成与模板资源站，适合参考 landing page 的视觉包装、模板组织和产品叙事。
intro_en: An AI landing page builder and template resource, useful for studying landing-page presentation, template packaging, and product storytelling.

name: SiteInspire
intro: 收录 personal 分类网页，适合快速查看个人网站的排版、字体和视觉风格。
intro_en: A personal website gallery for checking layout, typography, and visual style.

name: Land-book
intro: 以落地页和作品集为主的灵感库，适合参考 portfolio 的首屏结构和视觉节奏。
intro_en: A gallery of landing pages and portfolios, useful for first-screen structure and visual rhythm.

name: Page Flows
intro: 聚合真实产品的用户流程和界面模式，适合参考任务流程、转场和 UX 细节。
intro_en: A collection of real product flows and UI patterns for studying UX details and task design.

name: Mobbin
intro: 大型移动端和网页 UI 截图库，适合查界面模式、组件细节和交互参考。
intro_en: A large UI screenshot library for mobile and web products.

name: Godly
intro: 精选高质量网站灵感，偏重品牌站、作品集和新产品官网的视觉表达。
intro_en: A curated set of high-quality sites, strong in brand style, portfolio design, and new product pages.

name: Component Gallery
intro: 收集设计系统里的界面组件案例，适合查按钮、表单、导航等组件的常见做法。
intro_en: A component reference built from design system examples, useful for buttons, forms, navigation, and other common UI parts.

name: React Bits
intro: 一个高质量的 React 动效组件集合，适合参考创意交互、动画组件和更有记忆点的界面细节。
intro_en: A high-quality React component collection with strong motion ideas, useful for studying creative interactions and memorable UI details.
